markdownRemark.html:
Flutter is Google’s UI toolkit for building beautiful, natively compiled applications for mobile, web, and desktop from a single codebase. If you appreciate the content 📖, support projects visibility, give 👍| ⭐| 👏

Contents

  • Articles
  • Videos
  • Components
  • Navigation
  • Template
  • Plugins
  • Frameworks
  • Experimental
  • Gaming
  • Open Source Apps
  • Web
  • Utilities
  • Books
  • Bonus
  • Jobs
  • Community

Articles

Introduction

  • Google IO 2018 - Building beautiful, flexible user interfaces.
  • Presentation - by Helio S. Junior.
  • Flutter Web - Ins and Outs of Flutter Web by Nash.

Websites / Blogs

  • Welcome to Flutter - English and French blog dedicated to providing practical solutions to most asked questions about Flutter by Didier Boelens.
  • SZAŁKO-BLOG - Step by step advanced design by Marcin Szalek.
  • Flutter by Example - Tutorials based on Redux, Firebase, Custom Animations, and UI.
  • Flutter Institute - Very original content and tutorials by Brian Armstrong.
  • Iirokrankka.com - Articles and tutorials and anything related by Iiro Krankka.
  • Norbert - In depth articles, features and app creation by Norbert515.
  • Flutter Tips - Articles, tips & tricks in the development by Diego Velásquez.
  • FilledStacks - Tutorials and guides on development by Dane Mackier.
  • Awesome Flutter tipsstars2.5k - Tips to help developers increase productivity by erluxman.

Tutorial

  • Animated Chat - Building beautiful UIs by Google Code Labs.
  • Firebase Chat - Firebase integration by Google Code Labs.
  • Planets-Flutter: from design to app - Detailed planets design tutorial.
  • Todo Liststars233 [227⭐] – Step by step tutorial how to build Todo List with Flutter by Andrei Lesnitsky

Beginner

  • Roadmap to Flutter Developmentstars2k [1864⭐] - Visual roadmap with principles, patterns, and frameworks for Flutter newbies by Olexandr Leuschenko.
  • Layout Cheat Sheet - Extensive examples of layout widgets by Tomek Polański.

Advanced

  • Rendering Pipeline [663👍] - Engine architecture by Adam Barth.
  • Render Objects - What are Widgets, RenderObjects and Elements? by Norbert515.
  • Streams and RxDart - Skillmatters presentation by Brian Egan.
  • Gesture System - Flutter Deep Dive: Gestures by Nash.
  • Schemas - Widget, State, Context and InheritedWidget explanations by Didier Boelens.
  • Rendering Engine Tutorial - Flutter's Rendering Engine: A Tutorial by AbdulRahman AlHamali.
  • Inherited Widget - Flutter’s InheritedWidget to hold app state by Chema Molins.
  • From Mobile to Desktop - Building applications for smartphones and desktops by Marcelo Henrique Neppel.
  • Accessibility widgets - Deep dive information about all aspects of accessibility by Muhammed Salih Güler.
  • Profiling w/ Timeline - Using the Timeline allows you to find and address specific performance issues in your application by Chinmay Garde.

Howtos

  • Parallax Effect - Parallax & non linear animation by Marcin Szalek.
  • Build Flavor - Define build configurations and switch them by Salvatore Giordano.
  • Build Flavor - Easily build flavors in Flutter (Android and iOS) with flutter_flavorizr by Angelo Cassano.

Videos

  • Boring Show - Exploration with the Flutter Team.
  • Tensor Programming [86🎬] - Very rich content by Tensor Programming.
  • Mtechviral [235🎬] - [Hindi/English] Mtechviral Series By Pawan Kumar.
  • Flutter in Practice - Free video courssd for beginners & non-programmers by Zaiste.
  • Whatsupcoders [82🎬] - Free video series on Flutter Widgets by Kamal.
  • Reso Coder - Intermediate and advanced videos by Matej Rešetár.

Frameworks

State management

Standard

Widgets

  • Hooksstars1.7k [1694⭐] - Advanced code sharing between widgets by Remi Rousselet.
  • Functional widgetstars390 [382⭐] - Code generator writing widgets as functions with annotations by Remi Rousselet.
  • Form Builderstars760 [740⭐] - Framework that simplifies building forms, validating fields, reacting to changes, and collecting the final user input by Danvick Miller.

Data

  • Graphqlstars2.6k [2536⭐] - Implementation of the GraphQL spec by Zino App B.V..
  • GeoFlutterFirestars213 [212⭐] - Implementation of GeoFirestore for flutter by Darshan Gowda.
  • Ferrystars178 [165⭐] - Powerful & Extensible GraphQL Client by Sat Mandir Khalsa.

Animation

  • Sequence Animationstars292 [287⭐] - Composite staggered animations by Norbert Kozsir.
  • SpinKitstars2.2k [2190⭐] - Animated loading indicators by Jeremiah Ogbomo.
  • Villainsstars296 [294⭐] - Page transition animations by Norbert Kozsir.
  • AnimatedTextKitstars1k [1021⭐] - A collection of cool text animations by Ayush Agarwal.
  • Drawing Animationstars337 [334⭐] - Create drawing line animations based on SVG path data by Carl Hauck.
  • Simple Animationsstars644 - Create awesome custom animations easily by Felix Blaschke.
  • Flutter-animation-setstars220 [218⭐] - Easy to build an animation set by efoxTeam.
  • Staggered Animationsstars809 [784⭐] - Easily add staggered animations to your ListView, GridView, Column and Row by mobiten.
  • Animate Do - Animation package inspired in Animate.css by Fernando Herrera.
  • Funvasstars202 [188⭐] - Create fun time based canvas animations by creativecreatorormaybenot.

Testing

  • Flutter Gherkinstars128 [124⭐] - Fully featured Gherkin parser and UI automated test runner by Jon Samwell.

Web

  • Responsive Frameworkstars523 [506⭐] - Automatically adapt UI to different screen sizes. Responsiveness made simple by Codelessly.

Experimental

This section contains libraries that take an experimental or unorthodox approach.

  • styled_widgetstars483 [459⭐] - Simplifying your widget tree structure by defining widgets using methods by Rein Gundersen Bentdal.

Engines

Rendering

  • Graphxstars234 [227⭐] - Making drawings and animations extremely simple, inspired by Flash, by Roi Peker.

Game

  • Flamestars4.3k [4190⭐] - Minimalist game engine by Luan Nico.
  • SpriteWidgetstars1.1k [1147⭐] - Toolkit for building complex, high performance animations and 2D games by Viktor Lidholt.

Open source games

  • Flipstars192 [192⭐] - Reversi game by Andrew Brogdon.
  • 2048stars178 [178⭐] - 2048 game by Anuran Barman.
  • TRexstars300 [292⭐] - Port of the famous Chrome's Trex game by Renan C. Araújo.
  • Crushstars380 [378⭐] - How to build a Math-3 game, like Candy Crush, Bejeweled by Didier Boelens.
  • Slide Puzzlestars119 [112⭐] - Classic slide (15) puzzle by Kevin Moore.
  • Tetrisstars1.2k [1155⭐] - Tetris game by YangBin.
  • Party Charadesstars154 [153⭐] - Party charades by Kamil Rykowski.
  • Ghost Riggerstars132 [131⭐] - Ghost Rigger is a cyberpunk inspired puzzle game by Iain Smith and Julio Ernesto Rodríguez Cabañas.

Game Engine resources

  • Awesome Flamestars289 - Curated list of the best Flame games, projects, libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more by Flame Engine.

Open Source Apps

Premium

  • History Of Everythingstars5.6k [5539⭐] - Animated vertical timeline of humanity by 2D, Inc.
  • Developer Queststars2.8k [2827⭐] - Become a tech lead, slay bugs by 2D, Inc.

Top

  • Flutter Team Samplesstars9.7k [9605⭐] - Collection of examples (including maps, json, Material and Cupertino) by the Flutter team.
  • Flutter Common Widgetsstars22.6k [22597⭐] - Collection of official widgets demos & docs in chinese to help developers learn quickly by Alibaba Auction Frontend Team.
  • Meme Chatstars496 [493⭐] - Chat app on Flutter, using Firebase, Google Sign In, and device camera integration by a team of Googlers.
  • Flitterstars182 [182⭐] - Glitter app by Hadrien Lejard and Kevin Segaud. It uses Redux and Jaguar.
  • Limestars349 [348⭐] - Lime social network by Sebastian Sellmair.
  • Planetsstars688 [684⭐] - Planet exploration that demonstrate rich UI by Sergi Martínez.
  • NewsBuzzstars472 [471⭐] - Firebase backed news reader using News API by Ankur Kedia.
  • DroidKaigi2018-flutterstars496 [493⭐] - Unofficial conference app for DroidKaigi 2018 Tokyo by konifar.
  • Music Playerstars1.2k [1231⭐] - Full featured music player by Pawan Kumar.
  • WhatTodostars834 [826⭐] - Todoist like UI by Burhanuddin Rashid.
  • FlutterGramstars1.7k [1705⭐] - Complete Instagram based on Firestore & Google Functions by MDanics.
  • BookSearchstars446 [443⭐] - Digital BookShelf for your reading progress by Norbert515.
  • Cinematicstars797 [795⭐] - UI for Movie DB Public API by Aaron Oertel.
  • Beer-Me-Upstars418 [418⭐] - Beer tracking nicely designed by Benoit Letondor.
  • Tracestars683 [668⭐] - Modern and powerful crypto portfolio & market explorer by Trent Piercy.
  • Taskiststars664 [655⭐] - Taskist is a ToDo List app for Task Management by Hugo EXTRAT.
  • Tourismstars237 [236⭐] - Tourism app based on redux w/ animations & i18n by blueMixstars237.
  • Trinity Orientation @ Univ Torontostars510 [508⭐] - Orientation week at Trinity College, U of T by Matthew Tory.
  • Transform Widgetstars27 - Image widgets as 3D game engine sprites by Paul Thomas.
  • Deerstars274 [272⭐] - Minimalist Todo Planner built using BLoC pattern by Aleksander Woźniak.
  • TailorMadestars220 [219⭐] - Managing a Fashion designer's daily routine using a mixture of ReBLoC w/ Firebase Cloud Store & Functions by Jeremiah Ogbomo.
  • Instorystars189 [187⭐] - Instgram story downloader with a beautiful UI Sarath.
  • Spacex-Gostars573 [564⭐] - Simple yet powerful, open-source SpaceX launch tracker. jesusrp98.
  • Superhero Interactionstars217 [216⭐] - Cool Superhero interaction animation by Pinkesh Darji.
  • Replystars513 [509⭐] - 'Reply' Material Design case study by Frederik Schweiger.
  • Enigmastars329 - Privacy chat with end-to-end encryption by AmitJoki.
  • Chillifystars504 - Fancy music app made with Provider and Bloc pattern by Karim Elghamry.
  • Pokedexstars1k - Pokedex app with beautiful UI and smooth animation by Hung Pham.
  • Timy Messengerstars1.7k [1650⭐] - Group messaging app with a focus on organizing events by Miguel Beltran and Franz Heinfling.
  • GitJournalstars1.3k [1221⭐] - Journaling your data in a Git Repo by Vishesh Handa.
  • AuthPassstars638 [622⭐] - Keepass compatible password manager for mobile and desktop by hpoul.
  • Fwitterstars1.2k [1173⭐] - Full Twitter clone using Firebase solution by Sonu Sharma.
  • Harpystars380 [260⭐] - A feature rich Twitter client by Roberto Doering.

Utilities

  • Mutisya 2 - Online Flutter Studio by Paul Mutisya.
  • Launcher Iconsstars1.2k - Generate your launcher icons easily by Mark O'Sullivan and Franz Silva.
  • Redux Starter/Code Generatorstars266 [266⭐] - Starter project and code generator with Redux support by Hillel Coren.
  • FlutterIcon [274⭐] - Icon set generator by Mike Hoolehan.
  • FVMstars1.6k [1472⭐] - Flutter Version Management: A simple cli to manage Flutter SDK versions.
  • Environment Configurationstars75 [66⭐] - CLI tool to generate .env configurations for application environments by TatsuUkraine.
  • Flutter Flavorizrstars116 [111⭐] - CLI utility to easily generate flavors for Android and iOS in less than 3 minutes by Angelo Cassano.
  • Fontifystars63 [62⭐] - CLI tool to convert SVG icons to OTF font and generate Flutter-compatible class by Igor Kharakhordin.
  • FlutterGenstars612 [608⭐] - Assets code generator for your images, fonts, colors, etc — Get rid of String-based APIs.
  • Very Good Clistars720 [685⭐] - Very Good Command Line Interface for Dart created by Very Good Ventures.
  • Zeplin Extensionsstars33 - Zeplin code generator by yutae.
  • Pixel Perfectstars23 - Development tool to compare your layouts with design mockups by Kherel.

VSCode

  • Awesome Snippets - Collection of commonly used classes and methods by Nash.
  • Flutter Files - Quick generation for BLoC templates files by context menu by Gorniv.
  • Flutter Intl - i18n binding from arb files by Localizely.

IntelliJ / Android Studio

  • Enhancement_Suitestars164 [154⭐] - Search for pub.dev libraries, update version, Bloc, Snippet, etc you're covered by Marius Höfler.
  • Flutter Intl - 18n binding from arb files by Localizely.

Desktop

  • Desktop Embeddingstars6.8k [6828⭐] - Desktop implementations of the Flutter embedding API by Google.
  • Golang Desktop Embedderstars4.8k [4728⭐] - Golang embedder for desktop by Pierre Champion.
  • Rust Desktop Embedderstars1.7k [1733⭐] - Rust embedder for desktop by juju.
  • bitsdojo_windowstars149 - Customize windows owner-drawn chrome by BitsDojo.
  • Raspberry Pi Embedderstars577 [557⭐] - Light-weight Embedder for Raspberry Pi by Hannes Winkler.

  • Flutter for Beginners - by Alessandro Biessek.
  • Flutter in Action - by Eric Windmill.
  • Learn Google Flutter Fast - by Mark Clow.
